title: Building with ADK & A2A: How multi-agent collaboration designs a game
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates multi-agent collaboration using Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Agent2Agent protocol (A2A) to coordinate AI agents across architecture, asset rendering, and project management tasks. The demonstration builds a game using a human-in-the-loop framework with agents deployed on Cloud Run.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates multi-agent collaboration using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Agent2Agent protocol (A2A) to build a game. Separate agents handle architecture, asset rendering, and project management tasks, coordinated through a human-in-the-loop framework with the agents deployed on Cloud Run. The demonstration shows how ADK and A2A combine to orchestrate specialized agents across a single workflow.
